message:
feat(codegen): Add numeric ABC infrastructure and ternary type unification

Phase 1: Numbers ABC Registry
- Create numbers_abc.zig with NumbersABC enum hierarchy
- Add isBuiltinSubclassOfABC() for Python numeric tower
- Export isNumbersSubclass(), parseNumbersABC() in runtime.zig
- Fix numbers_mod.zig to emit enum refs instead of struct literals
- Update type_checks.zig genIssubclass for numbers.X handling

Phase 2: Ternary Type Unification
- Add optional wrapping in genIfExpr for `x if cond is None else y`
- Emit @as(?T, ...) when one branch is None for type unification
- Add emitZigTypeFor() helper in core.zig

Phase 3: Fraction Constructor Dispatch
- Add type-aware dispatch in calls.zig for Fraction(arg)
- Use from_float for float args, fromString for string args
- Default to fromInt for int/unknown types
